name: Pediatrics: Chapter 15 An Overview of Growth, Development, and Nutrition

options: mature they also have a different growth chart

scenarios.question: When caring for pediatric patients, the nurse should: (Select all that apply.)
options: must know what is normal in order to recognize any devi
scenarios.rationale: Pediatric nursing: must know what is normal in order to recognize any deviations within a given age group and plan care accordingly (Slide 2)

scenarios.question: Complete the statement.
scenarios.cloze_text: Pediatric nurses use [[BLANK1]] techniques and consider [[BLANK2]] in all interactions.
scenarios.rationale: Family-centered, age-appropriate care is essential. (Slide 18)

scenarios.question: Click normal pediatric findings.
scenarios.highlight_text: Child is alert and responsive. Vital signs within age-appropriate range. No distress noted. Parent is engaged.
scenarios.rationale: All normal findings. (Slide 22)

scenarios.question: Child with concerning findings.
scenarios.rationale: Thorough assessment and follow-up essential. (Slide 28)
